story_title: Wire renderer attachment flow to blob storage service

questions.question: Does the paperclip button (handleAddFile) call storeBlob() via IPC instead of showing the 'Not yet implemented' toast?
questions.actionable_check: Read handleAddFile in main.tsx, verify it calls addAttachment(filePath) which calls window.api.blobStorage.storeBlob(filePath). Verify no 'Not yet implemented' toast exists.
questions.pass_criteria: handleAddFile calls addAttachment which calls storeBlob. No 'Not yet implemented' toast.

questions.question: Does drag-and-drop (handleDrop) pass file.path to addAttachment instead of using browser-side hash?
questions.actionable_check: Read handleDrop in main.tsx, verify it extracts file.path and passes it to addAttachment(filePath, file). Verify addAttachment uses storeBlob not crypto.subtle.digest.
questions.pass_criteria: handleDrop extracts file.path from Electron File object and passes to addAttachment. addAttachment calls window.api.blobStorage.storeBlob(filePath).

questions.question: Does addAttachment use the hash and metadata returned by storeBlob instead of browser-side values?
questions.actionable_check: Read useAttachments.ts addAttachment function. Verify it uses result.hash and result.metadata from storeBlob, not crypto.subtle.digest.
evidence_required: addAttachment code showing storeBlob result usage
questions.pass_criteria: Hash comes from storeBlob response. No browser-side hash generation exists. Metadata (sizeBytes, mimeType, dimensions, blurhash) comes from storeBlob.

questions.question: Does the implementation preserve client-side thumbnail generation for instant preview?
questions.actionable_check: Read addAttachment function, verify thumbnail generation still uses the File object via generateThumbnail() for image files.
evidence_required: Called when file is available and is an image
questions.pass_criteria: Client-side thumbnail generation preserved for images when File object is available.

questions.question: Does file validation still run before calling storeBlob to avoid unnecessary IPC round-trips?
questions.actionable_check: Read addAttachment, verify validateFile is called before storeBlob when File object is available.
questions.pass_criteria: validateFile runs before storeBlob when File object available. Invalid files are rejected without IPC call.

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced or left behind by this story (e.g., generateSimpleHash, getImageDimensions, blob URL creation)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search useAttachments.ts for unused functions like generateSimpleHash, getImageDimensions, or blob URL creation for localPath.
evidence_required: Search results for removed stub functions
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused functions remain. generateSimpleHash and getImageDimensions removed. No blob: URL creation for localPath.

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations of file path handling or hash computation?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search codebase for duplicate hash computation or storeBlob patterns.
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No duplicate implementations. Only one path to storeBlob from renderer.

mandatory_questions.question: Do all existing tests still pass after the signature change (addAttachment now takes filePath instead of File)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run full test suite, verify no regressions from signature change.
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All existing tests pass. No test depends on the old (file: File) signature.
